subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath gladdened the servant through the fragrant breaths of the utterances of His chosen ones, who have cast aside the world and arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی سر الخادم بنفحات بیان اولیائه الذین نبذوا العالم و قاموا علی
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
